reviews.review_title: Looks like a first school project
reviews.review_description:
There seems to be an other version on Steam, which looks (from the pictures) much better.
In this Quest 2 Version there are only a few levels, the menu and points does not work.
After each game: 3 Stars, Best Score: 8888, Time: 123, Score: 1000
In the overview always 15/20 stars.
Is this a "Test"-Downgrade from the Steam-Version, which nobody has really tested?
(I do not want to spend money on Steam again to test myself whether this version is realy what it seems to be)

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for your genuine feedback. We're sorry for any confusions caused, yes the score system is a bug and we'll fix it in the coming build. And yes again we choose 10 levels from the steam version (which has 20 levels) for the Quest only because the qualities are good enough to post here.
Btw, the menu and points seem ok to me, can you please email us at game@virivers.com, to be more specific?
Hope you have a nice day!

reviews.review_description: It is a game that is entertaining. It needs to be polished a bit in terms of effects. I would suggest to the developer to look at Tetris VR, that with a game of a lifetime, you put some visual effects like that and you make it 10 times more exhilarating. As far as the gameplay is concerned, the game is very good. Just that, polish the visual aspect A great game to pass the time, which is perfectly worth up to the last €.

I played these types of games on my phone and XBox and plays well in VR. For £3.99 it's a bargain.

Love to see Leaderboards and maybe even multiplayer added to this game down the line, but that all depends if the developers are willing to expand a £3.99 game.

Bargain!

developer_response.body: Thx a lot, we'll consider adding the leaderboard first.

reviews.review_description: I got addicted to a game similar to this game years ago playing it on a game console. But playing this game in VR is amazing 🤩 and so much more addicting. To the developers: Awesome Job 👍🏻

developer_response.body: So glad to hear that, thanks man.

reviews.review_title: Love it but needs to be explained
reviews.review_description:
Level 6
There is nothing near the escape pod for balls yet alarm keeps going of then explodes
Don't make any sense

Thanks for you reply
I can see what you say
But once the bombs start to flash they seem to go off no matter what I clear my balls from it but it's started it bleep and flash so it explox

developer_response.body:
Hi, we're deeply sorry for the confusions. There're 2 end points in level 6, as the gear rotates, the end point may go behind the gear and disappears. Thus the ultimate goal is that eliminate the balls before it disappears. Hope that explains.

Quick updates, we're working to make the end points more obvious, pls wait for the updates.

Thanks again for your feedbacks and we'll continue to improve this game. Btw, level 2 and level 8 are my favorites.

reviews.review_description: Love these games and bring it to the VR realm you've done a great job, one issue I struggle with is colour definition between blue and grey balls. A simple fix I'm sure or an option for custom colours would be great for the visually impaired 👍
